message.content:
@startuml
actor "图书管理员" as librarian
participant "读者" as reader
participant "图书目录" as catalog
participant "图书信息" as bookInfo
participant "借书记录" as borrowRecord

librarian -> reader: 验证读者信息
activate reader
deactivate reader

librarian -> reader: 获取读者借书数量
activate reader
deactivate reader

opt [超出借书数量]
  reader --> librarian: 借书失败
else
  librarian -> catalog: 获取图书目录
  activate catalog
  catalog -> bookInfo: 查询图书信息
  activate bookInfo
  bookInfo --> catalog: 返回信息
  deactivate bookInfo
  catalog --> librarian: 返回信息
  deactivate catalog

  librarian -> borrowRecord: 存储借书记录
  activate borrowRecord
  deactivate borrowRecord

  librarian -> catalog: 借出图书
  activate catalog
  catalog -> bookInfo: 减少图书数量
  activate bookInfo
  deactivate bookInfo
  deactivate catalog

  librarian -> reader: 减少读者可借数量
  activate reader
  deactivate reader
end

@enduml
